name: Retool
description: Monitor Retool internal tools for user access and role-based permissions compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Retool at https://retool.com
2. Go to Settings → API
3. Create an API token (requires Business or Enterprise plan)
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Retool Settings → API. Requires Business or Enterprise plan.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Retool users and their access to internal tools

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies Retool groups are configured for role-based access to internal tools
